title.en: Ye Tian encountered a Demon Venerable.

content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian encountered a Demon Venerable.

This was the first time Ye Tian had encountered the Demon Venerable.

Many Demon Venerables have entered the Ancient Abyss Realm, and it is naturally normal to encounter Demon Venerables.

And this Demon Venerable is the Blood Lake Demon Venerable of the Heavenly Blood Vegetable, and he still has a little relationship with Ye Tian.

He once infiltrated the Heavenly Blood Vein and assassinated Xu Guang, and the Lord of the Heavenly Blood Vein was the Blood Lake Demon Venerable.

"It's you!"

The Blood Lake Demon Venerable also recognized Ye Tian.

At the beginning, Ye Tian infiltrated the Heavenly Blood Vein and killed Xu Guang, he still remembered this incident and wanted to kill Ye Tian.

Now, there's finally a chance.

"It's just a legend to the Dao realm, even if it's the strongest Dao path, I can kill you!"

Of course, he also knew very well that this was one of Ye Tian's clones, but killing one more clone would also make Ye Tian suffer heavy losses, and he would be in a good mood.

Swish!

The Blood Lake Demon Venerable was full of the third sequence of supreme dao rules, and he killed Ye Tian with one hand.

However, he couldn't fight with all his strength, otherwise he wouldn't be able to stay in the Ancient Abyss Realm for a long time, and he would be forcibly expelled from the Ancient Abyss Realm.

But in the next moment, he was directly dumbfounded.

Rumble!!!!!

A kind of supreme legendary body appeared on Ye Tian's body, and they were all in the realm of perfection, and a terrifying aura erupted.

Moreover, Ye Tian even burst out with the power of the second sequence to the realm of the consummation of Dao rules.

A shot down.

The Blood Lake Demon Venerable was directly blasted away.

Even if his cultivation reached the peak of the early stage of the Mythical Dao Void Demon Realm, his strength was still much worse than Ye Tianyi.

"How can a clone possess so many Consummation Realm Supreme Legendary Bodies?"

The Blood Lake Demon Venerable was shocked.

Could it be that this is Ye Tian's body?

Thinking that this might be Ye Tian's body, he burned his bloodline power and fought against Ye Tian.

If you can kill Ye Tian's body, everything will be worth it.

But in fact, this is just a copy of Ye Tian's body, he can copy it if he wants to.

Thundered!!!!!

Under the fight between the two sides, the Blood Lake Demon Venerable was still beaten.

Even if he goes all out, it is still useless, and the gap in combat power is not small.

The point is, Ye Tian's second sequence of supreme dao rules is too powerful, and he has reached the consummation realm, how can the Blood Lake Demon Venerable compare?

In a short time, the Blood Lake Demon Venerable was severely damaged.

Boom!

The Blood Lake Demon Venerable's body was pierced, and the wound could not heal, that was the power of the second sequence of supreme rules, and with his realm of the third sequence of supreme rules, he could not dispel the power of the second sequence of supreme rules at all.

After a long time, the Blood Lake Demon Venerable's injuries worsened and he was in a state of heavy damage.

He was scared and ready to run away!

However, his speed was not as good as Ye Tian's, and he was completely beaten.

"Ye Tian is too demonic, how could the Innate Origin Domain Alliance give birth to such a demonic guy???"

The Blood Lake Demon Venerable was in despair.

Once upon a time, Ye Tian was not even a legend to the Dao realm, so he sneaked into the Heavenly Blood Vein, and as a result, in just a few years, he was already stronger than him.

Knowing this, he would have paid a huge price to assassinate Ye Tian in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, maybe he would have been able to kill Ye Tian, and there would not be such a situation as today.

"Ye Tian, I want to die with you!!!"

The Blood Lake Demon Venerable burned all his life, cast a lore secret technique, and a blood light killed Ye Tian.

This blood light seemed to be able to penetrate everything in the world, and Ye Tian's layers of the strongest legendary body were penetrated, and it was only when the last layer of the strongest legendary body was blocked.

Of course.

Ye Tian's body was also blown away, and he was slightly injured, but between breaths, this injury recovered.

"The final blow of the Blood Lake Demon Venerable is very good, if he treats this move as a basic attack, I am really not his opponent. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He scraped the remnants of the Blood Lake Demon Venerable and found some treasures.

"There are also several low-quality second-order Supreme Dao Rule items, but unfortunately there are no Innate Origin Treasures!"

After Ye Tian put it away, he continued to move forward.

......

Somewhere in the Ancient Abyss Realm.

Soho was in trouble, she had just obtained an Innate Primordial Treasure, and before she could leave, she was seen by a Demon Venerable.

After some fighting, she realized that she was no match and began to run away.

The Demon Venerable who fought with her was the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable who had been famous for a long time in the Demon Ancient lineage, although his cultivation was only in the early stage of the mythical level, he had the strongest bloodline and the body of the strongest legend, and successfully transformed the body of the legend into the body of the strongest myth, and the transformation was successful twice.

And Soho didn't even reach a single transformation, and his cultivation had only just reached the early stage of the mythical level.

Therefore, her strength is not as good as that of the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable.

Among this batch of Demon Venerables who came in, the strength of the Nine Xuan Demon Venerables can definitely be ranked in the top ten, or even the top five.

"Soho, you can't escape!"

The Nine Xuan Demon Venerable said coldly.

Soon, Soho was caught up again, and after a fight, Soho's body was pierced and he was seriously injured.

Just when Soho was desperate, an attack struck the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable through the layers of void.

Rumble!

The Nine Xuan Demon Venerable was directly shocked into the air, but he was not injured.

"Who?"

The Nine Xuan Demon Venerable was furious.

Soon, he locked on to the location of the attacker.

Ye Tian knew that he had been discovered, so he didn't hide it and walked out.

"Ye Tian, you go quickly, you are not his opponent!"

Soho hurriedly said.

"I know!" Ye Tiandao.

He knew that he was indeed not the opponent of the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable, a Demon Venerable who had mastered the supreme divine body and completed two transformations, how terrifying his strength was.

Although he has superimposed a variety of supreme legendary bodies, after all, it is not a body of myths and legends, at most it is comparable to the body of an ordinary patriarch, and it is only by relying on the power of the second sequence of the consummation realm of Dao rules that he can crush ordinary patriarchs.

But there is still a lot of gap between the strength of the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable.

In terms of life-preserving means, with the protection of the second sequence of supreme rules, his life-preserving means are more powerful than those of Soho.

Moreover, his replica body fell and fell, and it had little impact.

But if Soho falls, it really falls.

"Soho Patriarch, you go first, I'm a clone, even if I fall, it doesn't matter!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

Soho knew that he had been hit hard and could not help, so he prepared to flee.

The Nine Xuan Demon Venerable wanted to intercept it, but was blocked by Ye Tian.

His various supreme legendary bodies erupted, showing the second sequence of supreme path rules of the consummation realm, and under the explosion of combat power, he really shocked the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable.

"You have cultivated so many Supreme Legendary Bodies, and you have all attained perfection, and the second sequence of Supreme Dao rules has also reached the realm of perfection!"

"Demons!"

The Nine Xuan Demon Venerable was ready to kill Ye Tian first.
